reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
치아가 약한 2.5kg 치와와입니다 :)

껌을 고를때 기준은 너무 무르지도 딱딱하지도 않은
잘 잡고 먹을 수 있는것이 주된 선택기준인데요!

바잇미 덴티스틱은 처음구매해보는데 
베지맛 골랐고요! 역시 기호성은 좋고,
무르기도 적당한거같아여!  ㅎㅎ
손 꼭붙들고 먹는게 너무 기엽 ㅠㅠ 

손가락 한토막사이즈가 남았을때  삼켜버려서 ㅜㅜ
먹을때 그부분만 예의주시하면서 급여하고 있어요 :) 

좋은가격으로 시작할수있어 감동 리뷰남겨요 ㅎㅎ 
10개 다먹으면 또 구매하러오겠습니다 💛

항상 새로운것으로 감동주는 바잇미 감사해요🙌🏻
reviews.content_en:
I have a 2.5kg Chihuahua with weak teeth :)

When choosing chews, my main criteria is finding something that's not too soft and not too hard - something my pup can hold and chew properly!

This is my first time trying BITE ME Dentisticks, and I went with the veggie flavor! The palatability is great, and the texture seems just right! ㅎㅎ It's so cute watching him hold it in his little paws ㅠㅠ

When there was about one finger-sized piece left, he swallowed it, so now I'm being extra careful with that part when feeding ㅜㅜ :)

I'm leaving this review because I'm so impressed that I can start with such a great price! I'll definitely be back to buy more once he finishes all 10 pieces 💛

Thank you BITE ME for always surprising us with new products 🙌🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
❤️바잇미 덴티스틱 찐후기❤️🦷
저이런 후기 진짜 안남기는 사람인데요..이거만 보면 순해지고 조용해지는 저희 맹수모찌를 보고있으몀 그저 뎅티스틱에 효력에 놀라고 자빠집니다 아쥬..🫶🏻 진짜 다른간식도 먹여봤지만 이것만 주면 자기 아지트가서 천사처럼 먹네요.
그리고 젤중요한건 제가 바빠서 양치못해준날도 있는데 이거 먹이면 입냄새 전혀 안나요!̆̈!
reviews.content_en:
❤️BITE ME Dentistick Real Review❤️🦷
I'm really not the type to leave reviews, but watching my little wild thing Mochi become so calm and quiet with this dentistick... I'm just blown away by how effective it is, honestly 🫶🏻 I've tried other treats too, but he eats this one like an angel, goes straight to his little corner with it.
And the most important thing - there are days I'm too busy to brush his teeth, but when I give him this, there's literally no bad breath!̆̈!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 뭐든 잘먹는아기라서 ㅎㅎ하나주면 3분정도 먹어요 길어서! 냄새 별로 안나고 좋습니당 부스러기도 없구요! 양치를 하기 싫어하는데 열심히 시키고 있습니다 최근에 병원갔는데 치석제거 좀 되었다해서 열심히 시키려구용!
reviews.content_en: Since my pup eats pretty much anything ㅎㅎ one stick keeps him busy for about 3 minutes because it's long! Doesn't smell too strong and it's great - no crumbs either! He's not a fan of tooth brushing, but I've been giving him these consistently. Recently went to the vet and they said his tartar buildup has decreased, so I'm going to keep it up!

reviews.name: 개****
reviews.content: 6둥이네,,껌 사이에 치약 발라주니 양치부담 줄어서 넘 좋아요!!말랑해서 이 약한 댕이도 잘먹고 잇몸에서 피도 안나고 좋네요!!딱딱한건 가끔 피나서 걱정스러웠거등요ㅠㅠ 꾸준히 먹일꺼에여!!
reviews.content_en: We've got 6 pups... I love how applying toothpaste between the chews really reduces the hassle of brushing! It's soft so even our pup with weak teeth eats it well, and no bleeding from the gums either! Hard chews sometimes caused bleeding which was worrying ㅠㅠ I'm going to keep feeding this consistently!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
4번째 구매입니다
다른거찾아봐도 이보다좋은 덴티스틱이 없는듯…
일단 거부감없이 잘먹어서 좋아요!!!
reviews.content_en:
This is my 4th purchase
I've looked for alternatives but there doesn't seem to be a better dentistick than this one...
First of all, he eats it without hesitation, which is great!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 치석껌이 새로 나왔다고 해서 바로 구매해봤습니다. 1.채소라서 알러지 걱정없이 먹일 수 있었습니다.
2.너무 말랑하지도 딱딱하지도 않아서 7살,1살인 우리 아이들 모두가 다 맛있게 먹일 수 있었습니다.
3.개별포장이 되어 있어서 여행가거나 유치원갈 때 간식으로 챙겨주기 좋아요.
4.  2가지 맛이 있어서 골라먹는 재미가 있습니다.

7살인 첫째는 너무 딱딱하면 먹지를 않고 입맛이 까다로운데 이 치석껌은 너무나 잘 먹더라구요!!! 
다 먹으면 재구매 해서 먹어야겠어요!! 이런 제품은 마니마니 만들어주세요~^^
reviews.content_en:
I heard BITE ME came out with a new tartar-removing chew so I bought it right away. 1. Since it's vegetable-based, I can feed it without worrying about allergies.
2. It's not too soft and not too hard, so both my 7-year-old and 1-year-old can enjoy it.
3. They come in individual packages, which is great for bringing as a snack when traveling or going to daycare.
4. There are 2 flavors so they have fun choosing!

My oldest is picky and refuses anything too hard, but he absolutely loves this tartar chew!!! Once we finish these, I'll definitely reorder. Please keep making products like this~^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 출시때부터 껌은 무조건 덴티스틱 급여하고 있어요! 원래 껌 한동안 안먹였는데 저작운동이 강아지에게 씹는 즐거움도 주고, 여러 제품 찾아보다가 적당히 말랑말랑하고 휴대하기에도 편한 덴티스틱으로 결정해서 꾸준히 급여중이예요! 절대 단종시키지 말아주세효..!
reviews.content_en: Since the product launch, I've been feeding dentisticks exclusively! I wasn't giving regular chews for a while, but chewing exercises give dogs both the joy of chewing and benefits for their teeth. After researching several products, I decided on dentisticks because they're the perfect softness and easy to carry around, so I've been feeding them consistently! Please never discontinue this product..!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
2봉째 빠르게 없애구 드디어 대용량으로 구매했어요
소프트한 질감이라 18살 할부지 멍멍이도 잘먹어요!
맛도 좋은지 요즘 요거 빼고 다른 껌은 거들떠도 안보네요 ㅠㅠㅋ
reviews.content_en:
We went through the second pack quickly, so I finally ordered the large size!
The soft texture means even our 18-year-old grandpa pup can eat it well!
He likes the flavor so much that he won't even look at other chews these days ㅠㅠㅋ

reviews.name: 개****
reviews.content:
15살 할매,,얼마전부터 딱딱한건 못먹어서 말랑껌 찾아주다 발견!!
야무지게 넘 잘먹어요~양치거부 심해서 걱정이 어마했는데ㅠㅠ
틈새에 치약 발라서 주니 효과 2배!! 요즘 할매 텐션 업이네요!
이 약한애들한테 넘 좋은거 같아요!!
reviews.content_en:
Our 15-year-old grandma recently couldn't eat hard chews, so I searched for soft ones and found this!! She eats it so eagerly~I was so worried about her refusing to let me brush her teeth ㅠㅠ but applying toothpaste between the chews doubles the effect!! Grandma's been in such a good mood lately!
This is so good for these sensitive little ones!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 2900원 특가때 구매 했었는데 강아지가 넘 잘 목어서 30개입으로 재주문했어요!! 이거 진짜 잘 먹어요 환장함
reviews.content_en: I bought it during the 2,900 won sale and my pup loved it so much that I reordered the 30-pack!! He really eats this so well, he's crazy about it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 양치껌이 새로 나온다는소식듣고 기다리고 있었는데 낱개포장부터 귀여운패키지 그리고 딱딱하지않는거 기호성까지 넘 맘에들어요~ 첨먹어보는거 낯설어하는편인데 서로먹겠다고 난리네요?  그리고 다이어트중이라 양치후에 하나로 둘이나눠줬는데 말랑해서 쉽게잘려요.
reviews.content_en: I was waiting to hear that a new dental chew was coming out, and I love everything about it—from the cute individual packaging to the fact that it's not hard, and the palatability is just perfect! 🐕 My pups aren't usually adventurous eaters, but they're fighting over these! And since they're on a diet, I give them one after brushing and split it between the two of them. It's so soft that it cuts really easily.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
우리 아이가 정말 밉이 짧아 아무거나 먹는 아이가 아니라  덴탈껌 구매에 애를 먹습니다
왜냐하면 고기를 제한해야하기 때문이죠
다른 채소껌도 기호가 좋다해서 사봤는데 통 먹질 않아요
바잇미에서 마침 이벤트가로 열 개를 팔길래 설마 하는 마음으로 먼저 구매했어요
그런데 아이가 너무 좋아하느거예요
채소껌인데 이렇게 좋아해도 되는걸까 할 정도로 기호성 대박입니다
그래서 큰 박스로 재구매...역시 잘 먹고 좋아하네요
아쉬운건 할인가라고는 하지만 약간의 비용부담이 있어요
살짝만 더 저렴해도 꾸준하게 먹일 수 있을텐데요
가격부담 때문에 이틀에 하나 먹이고 있어요
가끔 할인 한다면 쟁여둘 의사 100 입니다
reviews.content_en: My pup is really picky and doesn't just eat anything, so buying dental chews has been a struggle. It's because I have to limit meat in their diet. I tried other veggie chews that people said they liked, but my pup wouldn't touch them at all. Then BITE ME had an event selling 10 packs, so I took a chance and bought some first. But my baby loved it so much! I was shocked that they liked a veggie chew this much—the palatability is amazing! So I reordered in bulk and they keep enjoying it. The only downside is that even though it's on sale, there's still a bit of a cost burden. If it were just a little cheaper, I could feed it regularly. Because of the price, I'm only giving them one every other day. If there are occasional discounts, I'd definitely stock up 100%!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
엄청 말랑말랑한 껌이에요!
완전 고기파라서 껌은 좀 편식을 하는데 안먹는건 아에 안먹고 어떤건 숨겼다 한참 나중에 먹어요
치즈는 좋아해서 껌중에 치즈가 들어있는건 먹더라구요
바잇미 덴티스틱에도 치즈가 들어있길래 구매해봤어요!
첨 줬을땐 안먹고 숨기길레 조금 잘라서 주니 먹더라구요
(쪼금씩 잘라서 줬을때 먹으면 남은거 통째로 줘도 먹어요ㅋㅋㅋ) 
안먹어서 버리고 남주고 한적이 많아서 이번에도 안먹을까 엄청 걱정했는데 합격이에용!!
세일 많이 했으면 좋겠어요 히히히
reviews.content_en: It's such a soft and chewy treat! My pup is a total meat lover and is picky with chews—they either won't eat something at all or hide it and eat it much later. They like cheese, so they eat chews with cheese in them. I saw that BITE ME Dentistick has cheese in it, so I bought some! The first time I gave it, they wouldn't eat it and just hid it. But when I cut it into small pieces, they ate it! (When they eat the small pieces I cut, they'll even eat the whole one later 😂) I've had a lot of waste and disappointment, so I was super worried this time too, but it passed the test!! 😆 I hope they have more sales!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 말랑말랑해서 이빨이 약한 노견이 먹기에 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's so soft and chewy that it's perfect for my senior pup with sensitive teeth!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 베지잘먹어서 한박스재구매합니다 입냄새진짜좋아집니다~~
reviews.content_en: My pup eats the veggie ones well, so I'm reordering a whole box. Their breath really gets so much better~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
받자마자 서비스로 주신 덴탈껌 반으로 잘라서
아이한테 주니까 거부감도 없고 넘 잘먹어요
소프트해서 자르기도 편하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I cut the dental chew that came as a freebie in half and gave it to my pup, and they had no hesitation eating it—they love it! It's soft so it's easy to cut, and I really like it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
초특가할인 뜨자마자 구매하고 배송 오자마자 먹여봤습니다 ! 
원래 처음먹는 낯선거는 주면 물고가서 멀뚱멀뚱 쳐다보는데
전 날에 한번 맛 봤다고 다음날 꺼내자마자 봉지채 물고 튀었어요😂
다행히 혼자 까먹는 법은 터득하지 못하고 꺼내달라고 가져와서 봉지 까주니 집에 쏙 들어가서 먹네요☺️ 
나이가 많아 딱딱한 껌은 부담스럽고 괜히 걱정되는데 말랑해서 너무 좋구요!!!💕 말랑해서 금방 먹을 줄 알았는데 꽤 야금야금 오래먹구요☺️ 무엇보다 너어어무 좋아하네요👍🏻 다 먹이고 대용량으로 쟁이려 합니다⭐️
reviews.content_en: I bought it as soon as the flash sale dropped and gave it to them as soon as it arrived! 😂 Usually when they try something new, they just hold it and stare blankly, but after tasting it once the day before, the next day they grabbed the whole pack and bolted! 😂 Thankfully they haven't figured out how to open it themselves and brought it to me to unwrap. Once I opened it, they went straight into their crate to eat it. ☺️ Since they're older, hard chews are risky and worrying, but this soft one is so great!!! 💕 I thought they'd finish it quickly since it's soft, but they're actually enjoying it at a leisurely pace for quite a while! ☺️ Most importantly, they absolutely love it!! 👍🏻 I'm planning to get the bulk size once they're done! ⭐️

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 제가 외출하기 전 주고 가는 간식이에요. 큼지막해서 다른간식보다 좀 오래먹기도 하고 딱딱한거 별로 안좋아하는 저희집 댕댕이한테 딱이에요. 대용량으로 사서 쟁여놓을까 싶어용
reviews.content_en: It's the snack I give my pup before I head out. It's pretty big so they chew on it longer than other treats, and it's perfect for my pooch who doesn't really like hard chews. I'm thinking about buying it in bulk and stocking up!

reviews.name: 탁****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 출근 전에 주고 가는데 이거 먹느라  배웅도 안해줘요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: They absolutely love it! I give it to them before work and they're so focused on eating it that they don't even say goodbye 😂

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
특가로 구매해서 먹여보았는데 괜찮아서 재구매했어요~
울 댕댕이가 어금니가 말썽이라 가엾게도 씹고뜯는걸 즐기지 못하게 됐어요ㅠㅜ
그래서 부드러운것만 먹여야해서 딱!!!요거인것 같네요
reviews.content_en: I bought it on special and tried it, and it was good so I reordered! 😊 My pup has been having trouble with their molars, so unfortunately they can't enjoy chewing and tearing. That's why I can only give them soft treats, and this seems like the perfect fit!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지 껌은 바잇미만 구매합니다ㅡ대용량 엄청 착하뉴가격에 구매해서 너무 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: I only buy BITE ME chews for my dog - I got a bulk pack at such a great price and I'm so happy with it ^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 행사하길래 먹여봤는데 치아 약한 소형견에게 너무너무 좋아요. 저는 이거 통으로도 주지만 가위로도 잘 잘려서 노즈워크도 해주고요 여러가지 방법으로 활용해요 ㅋ 정말 잘 산 거 같아요. 다시 재구매 할 의사 있어요~ 치아 약한 아가들이나 소형견은 뼈간식 보다 이런 껌이 훨 나아요 아주 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: I tried it during a sale and it's amazing for my small dog with weak teeth. I give it whole sometimes, but it cuts really well with scissors so I also use it for nose work games lol. I think I made a great purchase. I'm definitely planning to reorder~ For dogs with weak teeth or small breeds, this kind of chew is way better than bone treats. Very satisfied!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 신제품 나왔을때 10개입 사서 먹여보고 너무너무 좋아하고 잘먹어서 큰용량으로 또 구입했어요ꪔ̤̫ෆ 입냄새 정말 덜나요!!!
reviews.content_en: When the new product came out I bought a 10-pack and my dog loved it and ate it so well, so I bought the bulk size again ꪔ̤̫ෆ The bad breath is really gone!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 말랑말랑 좋아요 ~낱개 포장이라 위생적이고 보관도 용이해요
reviews.content_en: It's nice and soft ~ Each piece is individually wrapped so it's hygienic and easy to store

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저녁에 밥 먹고 반개씩 잘라서 치약 뭍혀서 주고있어요 이껌만 들면 자기 간식먹는줄 알고 켄넬에서 기다리고있네요ㅎㅎㅎ입샘내도 없어지고 너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: After dinner I cut half pieces and apply toothpaste before giving it to her. When she just hears about this chew she knows it's treat time and waits in her crate hehe. The bad breath is gone and I love it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 늘 잘 먹는 제품이라 여러번 재구매했어요. 외출시 치약 뿌려서 주면 너무 잘 먹네요. 좀만 잘못먹으면 금방 탈나는 푸들 두마리인데 둘다 탈없이 잘 먹어요. 부드러워서 좋아요 릴렉스 효과도 있다고하니 일석이조에용

I have two Poodles who get sick easily with the wrong food, but both of them eat this without any issues. I love how soft it is, and it has a relaxing effect too so it's killing two birds with one stone!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 매일 양치시켜주지만 나이 들면서 누렇게 변하고 입냄새도 나는거 같아서 다른거 사면서 겸사겸사 담아봤어요ㅎㅎ 딱딱해보이나 강아지가 씹기엔 무리 없을 정도이고 기호성은 너무나 좋네요ㅎㅎ 10개 다 먹이고 효과 있으면 재구매 바로 할거에ㅣ용
reviews.content_en: I brush his teeth every day, but as he got older his teeth started yellowing and I noticed bad breath, so when ordering something else I threw this in just to see! It looks pretty firm but it's totally manageable for my dog to chew, and he absolutely loves it! Once he finishes all 10 and if it works, I'm reordering right away!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 아가는 원래 뼈 간식만 좋아하고 덴탈껌은 잘 안먹었는데 비교적 말랑하다길래 구매해봤습니다! 딱딱한 간식보다는 소프트한 간식을 선호하는 편이라 특가하는 김에 사봤는데 잘 먹어요ㅠ 양치효과도 있다니까 꾸준히 먹여보려구용~

Since my pup prefers softer treats over hard ones, I grabbed it while it was on sale and she's eating it well ㅠ I heard it has a teeth-cleaning effect too, so I'm planning to give it to her consistently~

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 정말 너무너무 잘먹어요! 딱딱한 껌은 티아가 파절될거같아서 걱정이 많았는데 이 껌은 적당히 말랑하고 딱딱한 정도여서 마음놓고 먹이고 있어요. 바잇미 좋은제품 많이 만들어주세요~~! 최고👍🏻
reviews.content_en: She absolutely LOVES it! 😋 I was really worried that hard chews would crack Tia's teeth, but this chew has just the right softness and firmness, so I'm giving it to her without worry. BITE ME, please keep making great products~~! The best👍🏻

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 야채 싫어 강아지라 베지를 구매하면서도 잘 먹어줄까? 했는데 포장지에서부터 졸졸졸 따라와서 한입에 물어갔어요! 새로운 간식을 경계하는 편인데 좋은 냄새라도 났는지 홀라당 순삭하셨답니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup hates vegetables, so I wasn't sure if she'd eat the veggie treats, but she followed me from the moment I opened the package and grabbed it in one bite! She's usually cautious about new treats, but something about the good smell made her go crazy for it in seconds.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 이렇게 까지 좋아할줄 몰랐어요

말랑말랑해서 소형견도 잘 먹을것같아요
reviews.content_en: ㅋㅋㅋ I didn't expect she'd like it this much! Our Meong-meong gulps it down in just a few bites, but since it's soft and chewy, I think small breeds will have no problem eating it either.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 소량인데도 개별포장되어있어서 넘남 좋아요. 센스만점 바잇미! 다니면서 우리 강아지랑 친한 친구들한테 줬는데 다들 맛있게 뇸뇸냠냠 먹네요. 모양이 치약이랑 같이 급여하기 좋게 되어있어서 안쪽에 있는 홈에 치약 발라서 주기도한답니다.
reviews.content_en: Even though it's a small amount, each one is individually wrapped, which is amazing! Perfect sense BITE ME! 👏 I gave them to my pup and her doggy friends while we were out, and they all ate them deliciously, nom nom nom 🐶 The shape is designed perfectly to use with toothpaste too - I even brush the grooves inside with toothpaste before giving it to her!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 아이들이 엄청 잘 먹고 좋아합니다. 많이 딱딱해서 잘라서 급여하기도 좋아요. 아주 작은 아이들을 위해 더 작은 사이즈로도 출시되었으면 좋겠어요.
reviews.content_en: The kids love it and eat it really well. It's quite hard so it's easy to cut into pieces before feeding. I wish BITE ME would release an even smaller size for the tiniest pups!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 낱개포장이라 훨 좋아요 말랑해서 잘라주기좋고 먹을때 강아지 치아다칠까 걱정안해도되요^^
reviews.content_en: I love that it comes in individual packets! 😊 Since it's soft, it's easy to cut into pieces, and I don't have to worry about my pup's teeth getting damaged when she eats it^^

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
바잇미 덴티스틱 소프트 베지 구취제거 덴탈껌 10개입 🦷🐶✨

강아지 구취 관리용 덴탈껌 찾다가 바잇미 덴티스틱 소프트 베지 구매해서 먹여봤는데 만족스러워요 😊

✔️ 구취 제거에 도움 🦷
꾸준히 급여해보니 입냄새가 확 줄었다기보다는 확실히 덜 올라오는 느낌이라 구취 관리용으로 괜찮아요.

✔️ 부드러운 소프트 타입 👍
딱딱한 껌이 아니라 말랑한 소프트 제형이라 퍼피나 치아 약한 아이도 부담 없이 먹기 좋아요.

✔️ 기호성 좋아요 😋
베지 타입인데도 거부감 없이 잘 먹고 간식처럼 좋아해서 급여하기 편해요.

✔️ 급여 간편 💛
개별 포장이라 외출 시 챙기기도 좋고 위생적으로 보관 가능해서 편했어요.

✔️ 데일리 구강관리용 추천 👍
하루 한 개씩 꾸준히 주기 좋아서 양치 보조용 덴탈껌으로 사용하기 괜찮은 제품이에요.

전체적으로 부드러운 덴탈껌 + 구취 관리용 간식 찾는 분들께 추천합니다 😊
기호성도 좋고 부담 없이 매일 챙겨주기 좋아서 만족스럽게 급여 중이에요! 🐾✨
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Dentistick Soft Veggie Breath-Freshening Dental Chew 10-pack 🦷🐶✨

I was looking for a dental chew to manage my pup's bad breath, bought BITE ME Dentistick Soft Veggie, and I'm really satisfied 😊

✔️ Helps with breath freshening 🦷
After giving it consistently, the bad breath doesn't disappear completely, but it definitely comes up less, so it's good for breath management.

✔️ Soft and gentle type 👍
Since it's not a hard chew but a soft formulation, puppies and dogs with weak teeth can eat it without any strain.

✔️ Great palatability 😋
Even though it's the veggie type, my pup eats it without hesitation and loves it like a regular treat, so it's easy to give.

✔️ Convenient to feed 💛
Since each one is individually wrapped, it's great to bring on outings, and it's easy to store hygienically.

✔️ Recommended for daily oral care 👍
It's perfect for giving one piece a day consistently, so it's a good product to use as a supplementary dental chew alongside brushing.

Overall, I'd recommend this to anyone looking for a soft dental chew + breath-freshening treat 😊
Great palatability and easy to give daily without any worries, so I'm very satisfied giving it to my pup! 🐾✨

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 아이는는 워낙 먹성도 좋고 뭐든 빨리 먹는 편이라 집을 오래 비우는 날이 있을 때면 최대한 오래 씹으면서 놀면 좋을 것 같아 딱딱한 간식들을 많이 줬었는데요어느순간 보니까 맨끝 어금니가 부러져있었어요. 

생각보다 딱딱한 간식들을 자주 먹는 아이들이 이렇게 이빨이 부러지거나 금이 간 상태인 경우가 많다고 하니 꼭 확인해보세요!

그래서 선생님한테도 여쭤보고 여러방면으로 알아보니 소형견이든 중대형견이든 무조건 딱딱한 걸 주는 건 안 좋고혼자 뒀을 때 뼈로 된 먹거리들을 먹다가 조각이 목에 걸릴 위험이 있어서 권장하지 않는다고 하네요

그래서 이제 너무 물컹하지 않은 적당한 말랑함이 있는 걸로 찾아야겠다 생각에 알아보기 시작했다가 원료까지 괜찮은 걸 보고너무 물렁물렁해서 씹는 맛 없이 넘어가는 건 아니고 쫄깃쫄깃하게 탄성감이 있어요 이렇게 적당한 제형감이 있으니 아이들이 씹으면서 이빨과 잇몸에 적당한 자극을 줄 수 있어 튼튼한 이빨을 가질 수 있겠더라구요. 

​
reviews.content_en:
My pup has a really good appetite and eats quickly, so on days when I'm away for a long time, I used to give her lots of hard treats hoping she'd chew on them longer. But then I noticed one day that her back molar was broken.

Apparently, dogs that eat hard treats frequently often end up with broken or cracked teeth like this, so please make sure to check! 😢

So I asked my vet and looked into it from various angles, and learned that whether it's a small or large breed, always giving hard treats isn't good, and bone-based foods can be dangerous when left alone since fragments can get stuck in their throat.

So I decided to look for something with moderate softness—not too mushy. After checking the ingredients and finding something good quality, I realized it's not so soft that they just swallow without chewing. It has a chewy, bouncy texture. With this kind of appropriate texture, when dogs chew it, it gives their teeth and gums just the right amount of stimulation, so they can develop strong teeth. 💪

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
▪️전에 낱개로 구매해서 먹여보고 구매했습니다
▪️지금 꽉찬 7개월이라 이빨이 우두두 빠지기 시작했는데요.
▪️ 그 덕에 이빨이 수월하게 빠지기도 했고,
소프트라 아가들도 무리없이 잘 먹을 수 있을거 같아요.
▪️바잇미는 항상 믿고 구매할 수 있어서  너무 좋아용
reviews.content_en:
▪️ I bought it individually before and fed it to her, then decided to buy the full pack
▪️ She's just turned 7 months old now and her teeth are starting to fall out
▪️ Thanks to these chews, her teeth have been falling out smoothly
▪️ Since it's soft, even puppies should be able to eat it without any problem
▪️ BITE ME is always reliable and trustworthy, so I love buying from them 💕
